findings.evidence: PrimeRadicands.lean:41-44 and CoprimeSquarefree.lean:51-54 are textually identical; both files import TauCeti.NumberTheory.Multiquadratic.Degree.
findings.fix: Hoist the helper (non-private) into a file both already import — e.g. Degree.lean — and delete both private copies, reusing the shared one.
findings.issue: private theorem not_isSquare_of_squarefree_of_not_isUnit is byte-for-byte identical to the one in PrimeRadicands.lean:41 (same {R}[CommMonoid R] statement and proof). Two copies of the same helper.

findings.evidence: sq_sqrt_natCast (PrimeRadicands.lean:68-70) and sq_sqrt_intCast (CoprimeSquarefree.lean:97-99) differ only by ℕ-vs-ℤ cast and the added 0≤n hypothesis.
findings.fix: Keep only sq_sqrt_intCast in a shared location and derive sq_sqrt_natCast from it (Int.cast of (n:ℤ)≥0), or otherwise unify the two.
findings.issue: sq_sqrt_intCast parallels the existing sq_sqrt_natCast (PrimeRadicands.lean:68); the nat version is the n≥0 special case of the int version, so they are a redundant parallel pair.

summary: The main results (integer coprime/squarefree square-class independence, its ℚ cast, the degree corollary) are genuinely new and reuse finrank_adjoin_range correctly. But the file re-declares a private helper verbatim from PrimeRadicands.lean and adds a sq_sqrt cast lemma that is a special case of an existing one.
